mapper.select:
SELECT ID, STORAGE_CODE, STORAGE_NAME, STORAGE_TYPE_CODE, STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, ROW_COUNT, COLUMN_COUNT, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_STORAGE
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STORAGE( ID, STORAGE_CODE, STORAGE_NAME, STORAGE_TYPE_CODE, STORAGE_TYPE_NAME, ROW_COUNT, COLUMN_COUNT, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rowCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{columnCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_STORAGE SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, STORAGE_CODE = #{storageCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STORAGE_NAME = #{storageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STORAGE_TYPE_CODE = #{storageTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STORAGE_TYPE_NAME = #{storageTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ROW_COUNT = #{rowCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, COLUMN_COUNT = #{columnCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, STORAGE_CODE, STACK_CODE, STACK_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK WHERE STORAGE_CODE = #{storageCode}
and STACK_NAME LIKE #{stackName}

SELECT ID, STORAGE_CODE, STACK_CODE, STACK_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_STORAGE_STACK
id = #{id}
select count(*) from M_STORAGE_STACK where STORAGE_CODE = #{storageCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_STORAGE_STACK( ID, STORAGE_CODE, STACK_CODE, STACK_NAME, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storageCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stackCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stackName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE M_STORAGE_STACK SET STORAGE_CODE = #{storageCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STACK_CODE = #{stackCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STACK_NAME = #{stackName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
